item.title: Has Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd declared dividend?
item.description: Yes, Oracle Financial Services Software Ltd has declared a dividend of 5400% (₹130 per share) with an ex-date of May 7, 2026. The company has shown strong total returns across various periods, particularly over the long term. Time: Apr 24 2026 11:30 PM IST
